## Checklist

- [ ] Runs against a stock `floci/floci:latest` container (`docker run -p 4566:4566 floci/floci:latest`)
- [ ] Lab lives in `labs/<kebab-case-name>/`
- [ ] `README.md` explains what it does and how to run it
- [ ] No real credentials — only dummy keys (`test`/`test`)
